## Problem

Describe the gap or pain point.

## Proposed change

Describe the feature or improvement you want.

## Scope

- [ ] runtime or bootstrap API
- [ ] capability helpers
- [ ] transport layer
- [ ] security or telemetry
- [ ] documentation or examples

## Expected outcome

Explain how this helps maintainers or derived MCP servers.

## Additional context

Add references, examples, or constraints here.
